name: International Brain Laboratory — Brain-Wide Map
description: A brain-wide map of single-neuron activity during a standardized perceptual decision-making task in mice, pooled across 12 labs. The release comprises 459 Neuropixels sessions (699 recordings) from 139 mice, covering 241 brain regions — a landmark open dataset for the neural basis of decision making and a model of large-scale collaborative, standardized data collection.
citation: International Brain Laboratory (2025). A brain-wide map of neural activity during complex behaviour. Nature, 645, 177–191.

publications.title: Brain-wide representations of prior information in mouse decision-making
